name: Cocktail Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first eight ingredients and shape into one-inch balls.
2. Place a sheet pan, 13 by 9 inches, in the oven.
3. Add one inch of water to the bottom of the pan.
4. Place the meatballs in the pan and bake at 350°F for 45-60 minutes.
5. In a saucepan on the stove, mix the chili sauce and grape jelly and heat until melted.
6. Add the meatballs to the sauce and continue heating for about thirty minutes, stirring occasionally.
